title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adani Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adani Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Adani Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adani Enterprises:
Adani Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises!
